gaps.title: Add TraitCoronaSimulation for solar corona rendering (A-009 example-driven request)
gaps.description: While refreshing examples/solar_system.refreshed.holo (2026-05-17), the solar orrery scene wanted to render a physically accurate solar corona. Currently the Sun is faked with bloom + @emissive_gi. A real @corona_simulation trait would support: (1) MHD flux-tube loop geometry (prominence arcs), (2) radial streamer belt pattern (equatorial current sheet visible at solar min), (3) coronal hole fast-wind regions shown as open-field polar plumes, (4) CME event trigger API for edu-XR space-weather demos. Suggested API shape: @corona_simulation { base_temperature_mk: 1.5, loop_count: 24, prominence_seed: 42, streamer_belt: true, coronal_holes: ["north", "south"], cme_enabled: false }. Without this trait the corona remains a bloom approximation — visually plausible but not distinguishable from any emissive sphere.
